title: Xtra Crispy Uruguayan Meat Skillet
description: A resinous, flaky, light Uruguayan dish featuring Thai green curry paste, char-grill-yang, and gluten-free-friendly ingredients, cooked to perfection in a cazuela vessel.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Heat 1 tablespoon of coconut oil in a large cazuela over medium-high heat.
Add the diced onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the diced bell pepper and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the ground beef, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks, until it is no longer pink, about 5-7 minutes.
Stir in the Thai green curry paste, char-grill-yang seasoning, gluten-free soy sauce, salt, and black pepper, and cook for 1 minute.
Transfer the cazuela to the preheated oven and bake for 15 minutes.
Remove the cazuela from the oven and stir in the chopped scallions.
Return the cazuela to the oven and bake for an additional 5 minutes, or until the top is crispy and golden brown.
